title: Name-inferred financial integration requires review at S5

origin.description: Contract seed: a pinned package whose name (mcp-stripe-payments) infers a payments domain but exposes no observed money-moving tool. Replace with a redacted real-world snapshot before R2 final acceptance.

humanExpectation.rationale: A payments-domain name suggests the server could move money, which is high-stakes (S5) and must be reviewed, but a name alone is not proof of a money-moving capability, so it is REVIEW rather than BLOCK.
knownLimitations: Name-based inference. A read-only payments-reporting integration would not move money; the false-positive note records this. An observed money-moving tool verb plus a capability surface escalates to BLOCK (see C009).
